title: hymenophyllum urbani
intro: Hymenophyllum urbani is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the 'air fern'. It is a epiphytic fern that grows in tropical and subtropical regions, and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Hymenophyllum urbani can be dried and used as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
